name: Accidentally Vored By Your Classmate
description:
CW: Vore, full tour

Callie is your nerdy calico cat classmate turned accidental pred when you tripped and fell down the stairs at school, right into her maw! She accidentally swallowed you, and now... she's stuck with you for the time being. She won't digest you though, she's too nice for that. You'll have to go the full way through her though, as she's unable to regurgitate you...

Artwork generated using PixAI
creator: Cheetaz
